compressed_prompt: Compose two angry limericks on moms' struggle to get kids to do chores. Use no commas. Separate with six asterisks (******).
response:
There once was a mom in distress
Whose kids never did help I must confess
They'd leave all the mess
For her to address
And she'd scream with a great big stress

******
Moms everywhere feel so annoyed
Their kids just won't lift a finger employed
The chores pile so high
As they watch kids go by
And they fume with a rage destroyed
